entity.summary: Archway-based decentralized exchange and DeFi protocol using specialized automated-market-maker designs and protocol-owned liquidity mechanisms. Astrovault entered mainnet operation around Archway's July 2023 launch period and remains accessible through its official trading application.
entity.notes: Launch date is normalized to month-level as 2023-07-01. First-party and Archway sources show Astrovault operating during July 2023 and describe its first three months on mainnet by October 31, but this review did not find a stronger day-level launch announcement. The entity remains medium confidence only for the precise launch date, not for current identity or operation.

events.title: Astrovault entered Archway mainnet operation
events.description: Astrovault began operating as a decentralized exchange in the Archway mainnet ecosystem during July 2023.
events.notes: Month-level normalized date. Sources establish July activity and an approximately three-month mainnet history by October 31, but not an exact public launch day.

events.title: Astrovault announced the Fusion pool upgrade
events.description: Astrovault announced a redesign of its derivative-oriented Plasma pools into Fusion pools with revised withdrawal and trading mechanics.
events.notes: Recorded as a material protocol and exchange-liquidity upgrade.

evidence.title: The Archway Mainnet is LIVE
evidence.notes: Archway's mainnet announcement lists Astrovault among the launch ecosystem's decentralized applications.

evidence.title: Astrovault Community Call Notes Thread
evidence.notes: Community call notes preserve operating metrics from July 2023, confirming that the DEX was live during the month used for the normalized launch date.

evidence.title: Fusion Upgrade: Plasma Evolved
evidence.notes: First-party update states that Astrovault had completed its first three months on mainnet and details the Fusion pool upgrade.

evidence.title: About Astrovault
evidence.notes: Current first-party site describes the active DEX design and links into the live application.
